series_metadata.series_title: Sexual Battery and Rape Felony Offense Investigation Files
series_metadata.series_description: Case files from Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) investigative units pertaining to criminal investigations that result in felony charges of sexual battery and rape offenses described in ORC 2907.02 and 2907.03. Records include, but are not limited to, request for assistance, reports, evidence submission sheets, custody records, recordings, subpoenas, laboratory notes, and photos.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: permanently, unless in paper or microfilm. ; Paper: permanently, unless in microfilm. ; Microform: permanently
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent
